title: Example from GitHub (make_tracing_sc) possibly not working
body:
This is an example from the this GitHub repo: https://github.com/verilator/verilator/tree/master/examples/make_tracing_sc

I'm using the version: ```Verilator 5.006 2023-01-22 rev``` on Linux Debian (installed with my package manager - ```apt```)

When trying to run the example (```make run```, which runs: ```verilator -sc --exe -x-assign fast -Wall --trace-vcd --assert --coverage -f input.vc top.v sc_main.cpp```), I get an error:

```Invalid option: --trace-vcd```

Furthermore, I could not find the command option ```--trace-vcd``` in your docs, but I found ```--trace```, which supposedly generates in the VCD format: https://veripool.org/guide/latest/exe_verilator.html?highlight=trace%20vcd#cmdoption-trace

So I changed  the option to ```--trace``` in the makefile and now it works.

My guess is, that the option used to be called ```--trace-vcd```, but it was changed and someone forgot to change it in the example. 

I can easily make a PR fixing this, but would like to make sure that I'm correct first.
code_blocks: Furthermore, I could not find the command option
